title: Hiri Sutta
subtitle: Conscience
author: Thanissaro Bhikkhu
contentHtml: Who in the world is a man constrained by conscience, who awakens to censure like a fine stallion to the whip? Those restrained by conscience are rare — those who go through life always mindful. Having reached the end of suffering & stress, they go through what is uneven evenly; go through what is out-of-tune in tune.
summary: A lovely short teaching on the rarity and value of conscientiousness.
